title: salix × taoensis
intro: Salix × taoensis, also known as Tao willow, is a hybrid willow plant that is a cross between Salix alba and Salix matsudana. The plant has been used in traditional medicine, particularly in Chinese herbalism, due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and anti-anxiety effects. The health benefits of Tao willow include reducing stress and anxiety, relieving pain and inflammation, and aiding in the treatment of various health conditions such as insomnia and menstrual cramps. Tao willow is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as being used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a range of health issues.
